title: July 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 18''' is the 199th day (200th in leap years) of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]], with 166 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Syd Mead]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[John Wagner]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Ryan Church]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Slim Khezri]] is born.
*1972 – [[Luke Ross]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Gabriel Hardman]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 73|''Star Wars Weekly'' 73]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 57|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 57]] published.
*[[1994]] – ''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 61|''Star Wars Insider'' 61]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2007]] – [[Dark Times 4|''Dark Times'' 4]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Unbound Worlds|Suvudu]] is launched.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Pantheon]]'' released.
*[[2012]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 3|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 3]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[George Coe]] dies.
*[[2016]] – "[[Race on Tatooine]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars: On the Front Lines]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader Annual 2|''Darth Vader Annual'' 2]] published.
*2018 – [[Poe Dameron 29|''Poe Dameron'' 29]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 51|''Star Wars'' (2015) 51]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Inquisitor: Rise of the Red Blade]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Inquisitor: Rise of the Red Blade (audiobook)|''Inquisitor: Rise of the Red Blade'' audiobook]] released.
*2023 – [[Get Well, Nubs! (Little Golden Book)|''Get Well, Nubs!'' Little Golden Book]] published.
<noinclude>
